name: audit-lead-radar
description: Recommend Korean listed audit-sales targets for the Samil PwC persona by combining OpenDART auditor, fee/time, executive, and firm-context signals.

interface.shortDescription: Recommend listed audit-sales targets from OpenDART and Samil PwC context.
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin for Samil PwC-persona audit lead research. It uses OpenDART public disclosures for listed companies to identify the current auditor, recent auditor history, consecutive auditor tenure, audit service fee/time, executive major-career signals, likely periodic designation or free-appointment timing, and sales-fit signals from configured firm context.
defaultPrompt: OpenDART 기반 감사인 지정 타이밍과 감사보수를 분석해줘.
Samil Listed Audit Radar 웹서비스를 실행해줘.
